perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a light blue shirt stands at a food stall in Tsukiji Market, holding a wagyu beef skewer topped with sea urchin, expressing surprise at the price. (2) Close-up shots of raw oysters on ice and various seafood displays are shown. (3) A man in a black t-shirt holds a similar skewer, looking at the camera and talking. (4) The woman is filmed eating a large oyster with chopsticks, showing a look of intense enjoyment. (5) She then bites into the wagyu and sea urchin skewer, nodding in approval. (6) The video concludes with her standing in front of a shop, holding a coffee drink topped with soft-serve ice cream, smiling and flashing a peace sign.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop music plays throughout. (2) A female voice speaks excitedly in Mandarin, discussing the high prices of the food and comparing them to Taiwan Dollars. (3) An off-screen male voice briefly joins the conversation, sounding skeptical then impressed. (4) Background sounds of a busy outdoor market are audible, including indistinct chatter and the sound of distant foot traffic. (5) There is a subtle slurping sound when the oyster is eaten.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese translate the dialogue about food prices and taste. (2) Decorative Hook Text: '日本' (Japan) and '築地市場' (Tsukiji Market) appear in large blue/white font at the start. (3) Price Hooks: '6000日幣', '1400台幣', '2000日幣', '450台幣' appear in bold colors to emphasize the cost. (4) Emotional Sticker: A red circular graphic with '爽' (Satisfying) appears when the woman eats. (5) Outro Text: '一日蛋白質補充完畢' (Daily protein intake completed) appears in stylized yellow font.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Price discussion hook -> Showcase of fresh seafood -> Eating reactions and taste review -> Closing summary with a drink.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 male companion in black, 2 children sitting on a bench in the final scene, and at least 4 passers-by in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with a bun hairstyle, wearing a light blue button-down shirt and a black crossbody bag.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Bustling street market with various food stalls, plastic tables, banners with Japanese characters, and many tourists walking around.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook (Price Shock) -> Evidence (Eating/Review) -> Outro (Final thoughts).
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to document a high-end street food experience at Tokyo's Tsukiji Market, specifically targeting a Mandarin-speaking audience by highlighting the luxury (and high cost) of wagyu and sea urchin while providing a relatable 'expensive but worth it' reaction.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of high-contrast text overlays for prices and emotional stickers like '爽'.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows standard short-form food vlog tropes including the 'first bite' reaction and price transparency to drive engagement.
